title: Service can't write its log: permission denied on /var/log
description_md:
The `orderd` background service runs as the unprivileged system user `orderd` (never as root). Since last night's deploy it dies on startup with `permission denied` trying to open its log file at `/var/log/orderd/orderd.log`. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), find out why the `orderd` user can't write there, and fix the permissions so it can.

You're done when the `orderd` user can create/append to files in `/var/log/orderd`.
